prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 51.3 kg; Height 153.7 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.5%; 6 months ago 6.8%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 126mg/dL; 6 months ago 158mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 50.2kg; 9 months ago 50.3kg; 6 months ago 49.2kg; 3 months ago 47.7kg; current 51.3kg), Height (12 months ago 153.7cm; 9 months ago 153.7cm; 6 months ago 153.7cm; 3 months ago 153.7cm; current 153.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 35U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; current 50mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 77mg/g; 9 months ago 98mg/g; 6 months ago 93mg/g; 3 months ago 88mg/g; current 72mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 60mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 61mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 153mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 136mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 145mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.88 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
